levels.body: “Craven” as a noun refers to an entity that is recognized as a coward (“Craven, *n*.” Sense 1.).
worksCited: “Craven, *adj. & n*.” *Oxford English Dictionary*, Oxford UP, March 2026, doi.org/10.1093/OED/5600985490. 18 Mar. 2026.

levels.body: The raven is characterized as being assertive and dominant instead of cowardly despite the lack of a decorative crest, which usually has the purpose of giving a majestic or threatening appearance (cf. [[crest-be-shorn-and-shaven]]).
